retry_reason: kref_get is unconditional and never fails; no retry needed.
contract_summary: Get-wrapper: increments the kref reference count on the endpoint ep. This acquires an additional reference that the caller must later release by calling _c4iw_free_ep or a corresponding put function. The debug print is incidental. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds. The caller retains the ep pointer and is responsible for pairing this get with a put.
